Installation
============

This document explains how to set up the Cook-App project locally.

Backend
-------

- Requires Python 3.10+ (check `pyproject.toml` in `backend/`).
- Create a virtual environment and install the backend requirements:

.. code-block:: bash

   python -m venv .venv
   .venv\Scripts\activate; pip install -r backend/main/requirements.txt

Frontend
--------

- The frontend is a Flutter project located in `frontend/`.
- See `frontend/README.md` for Flutter-specific build instructions.
